title: AshKiano MC stream pack
description: Modpack that I use on my YT streams
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

Modpack that I use on my YT live streams [https://www.youtube.com/@ashkianomc](https://www.youtube.com/@ashkianomc)

This modpack is the officially recommended client for playing on [www.ashcraft.cz](https://www.ashcraft.cz/). It enhances your Minecraft experience with smoother performance, immersive visuals, and various quality-of-life improvements — all while keeping the vanilla gameplay feel intact.

Perfect for streamers, content creators, and survival enjoyers alike.
✨ Visual Enhancements & Immersion

Take your Minecraft visuals to the next level with shaders, improved animations, and beautiful environmental tweaks:

    Iris Shaders + BSL Shaders – Advanced shader support with performance in mind.

    Fresh Animations – Brings mobs to life with dynamic, more expressive animations (requires compatible resource pack).

    3D Skin Layers – Adds depth and 3D detail to player skins.

    3D Crops Revamped – Makes all crops fully 3D for a better farming look.

    Falling Leaves – Immersive falling leaf particles from trees.

    Entity Model Features & Entity Texture Features – Adds better models and texture support to entities.

    LambDynamicLights – Real-time lighting from torches and other sources.

    Sound Physics Remastered – Realistic sound propagation through blocks and open spaces.

⚙️ Performance Optimization

Built to run smoothly even on lower-end PCs while still looking great:

    Sodium + Sodium Extra – Massive FPS boost and rendering optimizations.

    Lithium – Improves game logic performance.

    FerriteCore – Reduces memory usage (RAM optimization).

    Entity Culling & More Culling – Prevents rendering entities the player cannot see.

    Distant Horizons – Adds LOD chunk rendering for viewing far landscapes.

    Clumps – Merges XP orbs to reduce lag.

🎮 Quality of Life Features

Enhance the way you interact with the game without breaking vanilla feel:

    AppleSkin – Shows hunger saturation and food effects in HUD.

    BetterF3 – Cleaner and more readable debug screen.

    Mod Menu – Easily manage and view your installed mods.

    Shulker Box Tooltip – Peek inside shulker boxes without opening them.

    Chat Heads & More Chat History – Enhances the Minecraft chat experience.

    No Chat Reports – Disables Mojang's chat reporting system.

    Default Dark Mode – Adds a dark mode theme to the UI.

🧩 Enhanced Gameplay & Audio

Small improvements that add realism and smoothness to movement and sound:

    Not Enough Animations – Adds immersive animations like running with a bow or holding shields properly.

    Presence Footsteps – Realistic footstep sounds based on surface material.

    Low On Fire – Minimizes on-screen fire for better visibility when burning.

    Make Bubbles Pop – Adds bubble popping sounds underwater.

    InvMove – Move around while keeping your inventory open.

🗺️ Minimap & Navigation Tools

Keep track of your surroundings with simple and useful map tools:

    Xaero’s Minimap – In-game radar with waypoints and mob detection.

    Xaero’s World Map – Full-screen map of all explored areas.

    Packet Fixer – Fixes networking bugs for smoother server experience.

🧰 Core Libraries (Required by Other Mods)

Essential dependencies to make the modpack work properly:

    Fabric API

    Cloth Config API

    Forge Config API Port

    CreativeCore

    Text Placeholder API

✅ Summary

This modpack strikes a balance between performance, visuals, and functionality, making it the perfect companion for playing on [www.ashcraft.cz](https://www.ashcraft.cz/). Whether you're streaming, recording, or just enjoying a smooth survival experience, this setup has everything you need — with zero gameplay disruption and maximum immersion.
